title: Enhanced Spawners: Chambers of Control
description: Enhanced Spawners: Chambers of Control lets players upgrade and customize mob spawners using survival items, with full redstone control and spawn egg integration — all without commands or GUIs. Designed for clean, technical mob farms and dungeon systems.
body:
Enhanced Spawners: Chambers of Control is a minimalist plugin that lets players upgrade and customize mob spawners directly through survival gameplay. Right-click with specific items to enhance a spawner’s tier, alter its behavior with redstone, or change the mob type using spawn eggs — no commands, no GUI, and no external dependencies.

This plugin is ideal for technical survival servers, dungeon builders, and redstone engineers looking to create efficient, toggleable mob farms with progression and purpose. All features are designed with performance in mind and are fully configurable via config.yml.

✅ Supports Minecraft 1.20.4–1.21.4
✅ Compatible with Paper, Purpur, and Spigot
❌ No PlaceholderAPI required
❌ No GUI menus – works entirely through in-world interaction

Ready to take control? Power your mob chambers, your way.
